g.data-qualified-name: mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate..Inspect

g.text: v1 supports only azure-container-apps. Reads MDD
models + the target repo read-only. PAUSES with a
BLOCKING clarification (step 3) on ambiguity OR a
GENERALIZED go-live landmine — any choice whose
correctness depends on a fact NOT grounded in the
surfacing the gap, never a buried runbook STOP note.
Writes diagram + runbook + SECURE-BY-DEFAULT IaC in
the confirmed dialect, then STOPS. Never runs
the dialect is explicitly confirmed. One per run
(Bicep XOR Terraform). FULL PARITY; no silent default.
generated until dev/staging/prod is confirmed. No
silent default; never assume prod- or dev-grade.
store must have a named READER and WRITER, each with
an admitted network path. A read-but-never-written
store, or a writer with no admitted path, is SURFACED
as a blocking question — not shipped. Constrained by
